title: siddsachar/row-bot
summary: Row-Bot - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: darshi1337/apogee
summary: Apogee is a browser extension that uses local large language models to summarize and answer questions about articles, videos, emails, PDFs, and more. It runs entirely on-device, via WebGPU or WebAssembly, or connects directly to your own local Ollama instance. Your content never leaves your machine.
